title: Provider operational state
description: The committed, CI-validated active readiness document for the configured provider (DEC-0019). It makes the CONFIGURED_BUT_LIVE_DISABLED state machine-enforceable: every live-relevant flag is pinned false as a schema constant in this phase, so no committed document, configuration edit, or runtime flag can enable a live provider call — enabling live invocation requires a future conscious contract migration (new schema version, new decision record, secret-provisioning ceremony, and a separately signed smoke-call approval), never a document edit. The runtime Anthropic adapter loads this document through a fixed path and fails closed unless live_invocation_enabled is true, which is schema-impossible here. The document is digest-bound to the signed provider-policy-candidate so a substituted candidate breaks the binding.

operational_state.description: the adapter, contracts, and signed policy exist and are active; no credential is provisioned, no live or paid call has occurred, and live invocation fails closed

provider_policy_candidate_digest.description: must equal the active gateway policy's embedded candidate digest (CI verifies)

live_invocation_enabled.description: pinned false: live provider invocation is disabled in this contract version; a true value is schema-invalid

credential_provisioned.description: pinned false: no real Anthropic credential exists in NABCor; provisioning is a later personal ceremony

console_spend_cap_configured.description: pinned false: the provider-console USD 60 hard cap belongs to the later operational ceremony and is NOT claimed configured

live_call_authorization_ref.description: pinned null: no live-call authorization exists; a future smoke-call phase records its consumed approval evidence reference here under a migrated contract
